templates.body:
Hi [name],

[job_id] on track. Ship target [date].
Next: [step]. No action needed unless questions.

Hi [name],

[job_id] update: ship moves to [new_date].
Reason: [brief].
We own the fix. Next confirm [date].

Hi [name],

[job_id] waiting on: [item].
Ship stays [date] once we have it.
Reply here when ready.

Hi [name],

[job_id] in production now. Still on for [date].

Hi [name],

I owe you a clear update on [job_id] before you chase us.
[status]. My direct line: [phone].
Client touch logged [date]. job [id]. Do not promise new date without [owner].
Blocked on [x]. One unblock: [action] by [who] today.
